routing.guidance: Classifies the problem as a technology diffusion, substitution, or adoption system.

boundary.guidance: Pulls in complements, infrastructure, standards, switching costs, and diffusion channels.

structure.guidance: Makes cost curves, reliability, interoperability, trust, and ecosystem readiness central structural elements.

scenarios.guidance: Favors diffusion, stall, substitution, standards split, and complement bottleneck branches.

question_generation.guidance: Favors bottleneck, complement, threshold, cost/performance, and user-behavior questions.

evidence_planning.guidance: Prefers benchmark, deployment, developer, pilot, and retention evidence.

decision_logic.guidance: Shapes what action means: adoption timing, platform bet, ecosystem sequencing, and staged commitment.

signal_translation.guidance: Signals should emphasize deployment rates, benchmark improvement, developer activity, integrations, and retention after trial.

monitoring.guidance: Monitoring should track diffusion speed, standards adoption, complement readiness, and usage persistence.

render.guidance: Mainly affects domain vocabulary and examples.
